description: Distill skill regression evals. Tests noise removal, fact preservation, edge cases, and quality metrics across 20 diverse input files.

evals.name: distill-routing-explicit
evals.tests_change: Verifies /distill invocation routes to distill skill
evals.expected_output: Model invokes distill skill, reads the file, measures before, compresses, self-checks, writes, measures after, reports.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.check: Distill skill is invoked via Skill tool
assertions.pass_criteria: Transcript contains Skill tool call with 'distill' in parameter

assertions.name: before_measurement
assertions.check: Model runs wc + gzip measurement BEFORE distilling
assertions.pass_criteria: Bash tool call with wc and gzip appears before any Edit/Write to the target file

assertions.name: after_measurement
assertions.check: Model runs wc + gzip measurement AFTER distilling
assertions.pass_criteria: Bash tool call with wc and gzip appears after Edit/Write to the target file

assertions.name: report_generated
assertions.check: Model outputs a distill report with before/after metrics
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains a table with Words and gzip rows showing Before, After, and Reduction columns

evals.name: distill-routing-implicit
evals.tests_change: Verifies implicit distill trigger phrases route correctly
evals.prompt: Can you clean up and tighten this file? It's way too verbose. plugins/development-skills/evals/distill-fixtures/03-buzzwords-verbose.md
evals.expected_output: Model recognizes 'clean up', 'tighten', 'verbose' as distill triggers and invokes the distill skill.

assertions.name: distill_triggered
assertions.check: Model invokes distill skill from implicit trigger words
assertions.pass_criteria: Transcript contains Skill tool call with 'distill' — model recognized 'clean up', 'tighten', 'verbose' as distill triggers

evals.name: distill-hedging-removal
evals.tests_change: Tests removal of all 10 hedging patterns from noise-patterns.md category 1
evals.expected_output: All hedging phrases removed. Environment variables and code block preserved. Facts about rate limiting preserved.

assertions.name: hedges_removed
assertions.check: No hedging phrases remain in the distilled output
assertions.pass_criteria: Output file does NOT contain: 'important to note', 'worth mentioning', 'should be noted', 'bears mentioning', 'One could argue', 'goes without saying', 'Needless to say', 'As you may know', 'As mentioned earlier', 'Keep in mind'

assertions.name: env_vars_preserved
assertions.check: All three environment variables preserved in code block
assertions.pass_criteria: Output file contains RATE_LIMIT_AUTH=1000, RATE_LIMIT_ANON=100, RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW=3600

assertions.name: facts_preserved
assertions.check: Core facts preserved: 1000/hr auth, 100/hr anon, 429 status, Retry-After header, per-user not per-IP
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 1000, 100, 429, Retry-After, per-user (or equivalent)

assertions.name: word_reduction_30plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 30%
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 30%

evals.name: distill-transitions-conclusions
evals.tests_change: Tests removal of empty transitions (cat 2) and empty conclusions (cat 3)
evals.expected_output: All transition words and conclusion paragraph removed. Migration steps and dates preserved.

assertions.name: transitions_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain standalone: 'Moreover,', 'Furthermore,', 'Additionally,', 'In addition,', 'That being said', 'With that in mind', 'Having said that', 'In terms of', 'When it comes to', 'With respect to', 'In the context of'

assertions.name: conclusion_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'In summary', 'To recap', 'Overall', 'All in all', 'At the end of the day', 'The bottom line'

assertions.name: migration_steps_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: logical replication, pg_verify_checksums (or checksums), test suite, DNS, hot standby (or old primary)

assertions.name: dates_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: March 15 (or March 15-16) and March 10

evals.name: distill-buzzwords-verbose-constructions
evals.tests_change: Tests buzzword replacement (cat 5) and verbose construction substitution (cat 6)
evals.expected_output: Buzzwords replaced with specifics. Verbose constructions shortened. Architecture facts preserved. Summary paragraph deleted.

assertions.name: buzzwords_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'rapidly evolving landscape', 'transformative', 'revolutionary', 'empowers', 'cutting-edge', 'state-of-the-art', 'holistic', 'paradigm shift', 'seamlessly', 'synergy'

assertions.name: verbose_shortened
assertions.check: Verbose constructions replaced with short equivalents
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'in order to', 'due to the fact that', 'the vast majority of', 'in the event that', 'at this point in time', 'in spite of the fact that', 'in close proximity to', 'on the basis of'

assertions.name: architecture_facts_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: Kong, 50,000 (or 50K or 50000), Istio, RabbitMQ, 2 million (or 2M), PostgreSQL, Kubernetes 1.28, ArgoCD

assertions.name: summary_paragraph_removed
assertions.check: The empty 'Comprehensive Summary' section is removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'Comprehensive Summary' or 'paradigm shift in how we deliver'

assertions.name: word_reduction_40plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 40%
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 40%

evals.name: distill-noncommittal-to-direct
evals.tests_change: Tests converting non-committal language (cat 8) to direct claims
evals.expected_output: Hedged claims converted to direct statements. Specific numbers preserved. Three proposed fixes preserved.

assertions.name: hedges_to_direct
assertions.check: Non-committal language replaced with direct claims
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'can potentially', 'could possibly', 'might possibly', 'could potentially', 'may help explain'

assertions.name: numbers_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 3 seconds (or 3s), 2.5 seconds (or 2.5s), 47 queries, 8 items, 800ms, 40%, 50ms, 5-minute (or 5 min), 1 second (or 1s or under 1 second)

assertions.name: three_fixes_preserved
assertions.check: All three proposed fixes are in the output
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: parallel Stripe calls, batch query (or WHERE IN), response caching (or caching)

evals.name: distill-repetition-dedup
evals.tests_change: Tests deduplication of repeated facts (cat 9)
evals.expected_output: Each fact stated once. JWT 24-hour, bcrypt cost 12, rate limiting 5/15min each appear exactly once.

assertions.name: jwt_mentioned_once
assertions.check: JWT token details stated once, not repeated
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions 'JWT' or 'token' with '24' (hours) — and this combination appears at most twice (one for access, one for context)

assertions.name: bcrypt_mentioned_once
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions 'bcrypt' exactly once

assertions.name: rate_limit_mentioned_once
assertions.check: Rate limiting details (5 attempts, 15 minutes) stated once
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions '5' with 'attempt' (or 'tries' or 'failed') and '15' with 'minute' — this combination appears exactly once

assertions.name: word_reduction_50plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 50% (heavy redundancy)
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 50%

evals.name: distill-structural-padding
evals.tests_change: Tests removal of structural padding (cat 7) — intro, TOC, summary, excessive formatting
evals.expected_output: Intro, TOC, summary removed. All env var names and defaults preserved. Horizontal rules removed.

assertions.name: intro_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'This document describes' or 'comprehensive guide'

assertions.name: summary_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'This document covered' or 'Refer to this guide'

assertions.name: env_vars_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_POOL_MIN, DB_POOL_MAX, REDIS_URL, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, SENDGRID_API_KEY, SENTRY_DSN, FF_NEW_CHECKOUT, FF_DARK_MODE

assertions.name: defaults_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 5432, 5, 20, redis://localhost:6379, false, true

evals.name: distill-filler-openers
evals.tests_change: Tests removal of chatbot filler openers (cat 4)
evals.expected_output: All filler openers deleted. Code blocks preserved byte-identical. Technical content preserved.

assertions.name: fillers_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'Certainly!', 'Great question!', 'I'd be happy to help', 'Let me explain', 'Let me break this down', 'Absolutely!', 'That's a really good point', 'I hope this helps', 'Let me know if you have any'

assertions.name: code_blocks_preserved
assertions.check: Both code blocks (npm install + CORS config) preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'npm install cors' and 'app.use(cors({' and 'origin:' and 'maxAge: 86400'

assertions.name: cors_warning_preserved
assertions.check: Security warning about origin: '*' with credentials preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: 'origin: '*'' (or wildcard origin) with 'credentials' — the security warning

evals.name: distill-verbosity-compensation
evals.tests_change: Tests compression of academic verbosity compensation (cat 10)
evals.expected_output: Direct answer upfront. SQL commands preserved. Background compressed significantly.

assertions.name: direct_answer
assertions.check: The answer 'Read Committed' appears early in the document, not buried
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions 'Read Committed' as the default within the first 3 sentences or first 50 words

assertions.name: sql_commands_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'SHOW default_transaction_isolation' and 'SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL' and 'default_transaction_isolation = '

assertions.name: four_levels_mentioned
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read, Serializable

assertions.name: mvcc_fact_preserved
assertions.check: Key fact that Read Uncommitted = Read Committed in PostgreSQL preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions that PostgreSQL treats Read Uncommitted as Read Committed (or equivalent phrasing)

assertions.name: word_reduction_40plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 40%
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 40%

evals.name: distill-already-dense
evals.tests_change: Tests that already-dense text is not over-compressed
evals.expected_output: Less than 10% word reduction. Marked as 'already dense'. All values preserved.

assertions.name: minimal_reduction
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction < 15% (allowing small margin)

assertions.name: marked_dense
assertions.check: Model marks or notes the file as already dense
assertions.pass_criteria: Report or output mentions 'already dense' or 'minimal reduction' or equivalent

assertions.name: critical_values_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 02:00 UTC, 30 days, S3, prod-backups-eu-west-1, WAL, 03:00 UTC, AES-256, arn:aws:kms:eu-west-1:123456:key/backup-key, 12 minutes, 15 minutes, 2026-02-15

evals.name: distill-mixed-all-patterns
evals.tests_change: Tests handling of all 10 noise categories in one document
evals.expected_output: All noise categories removed. Timeline, action items, root cause chain preserved. Lessons learned section either removed or synthesized.

assertions.name: timeline_preserved
assertions.check: All 6 timeline entries preserved with times

assertions.name: action_items_preserved
assertions.check: All 4 action items with owners and dates preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: SRE team, Platform team, On-call team, March 7, March 10, March 14, March 15

assertions.name: root_cause_chain_preserved
assertions.check: The causal chain (TLS expired → DNS record deleted → DNS migration) preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: TLS certificate (or cert), DNS, February 28 (or migration), auto-renewal

assertions.name: impact_numbers_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 16 minutes, 342, 4 users (or 4 contacted), 99.97%, 99.95%

assertions.name: noise_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'important to note', 'Moreover', 'Additionally', 'it should be noted', 'Certainly', 'In conclusion', 'At the end of the day', 'The bottom line', 'comprehensive and holistic'

evals.name: distill-code-preservation
evals.tests_change: Tests that code blocks are preserved byte-identical
evals.expected_output: YAML and Python code blocks preserved exactly. Surrounding prose compressed.

assertions.name: yaml_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'actions/checkout@v4', 'postgres:16', 'POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test', 'pytest --cov=app', 'codecov/codecov-action@v4', 'kubectl set image'

assertions.name: python_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'postgresql://postgres:test@localhost:5432/postgres'

assertions.name: prose_compressed
assertions.check: Noise prose around code blocks compressed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'important to note', 'worth mentioning', 'Moreover', 'should be noted', 'In conclusion'

evals.name: distill-italian-language
evals.tests_change: Tests that non-English text is distilled in the same language
evals.expected_output: Output is in Italian. YAML config preserved. All 4 alerts preserved. Conclusion removed.

assertions.name: output_in_italian
assertions.check: Output text is in Italian, not translated to English
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains Italian words like 'configurazione' or 'monitoraggio' or 'intervallo' — NOT English translations

assertions.name: yaml_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: scrape_interval: 15s, 'app:8080', 'postgres-exporter:9187'

assertions.name: alerts_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: CPU > 80%, Memoria > 90% (or 90%), Error rate > 1%, Disk > 85%

assertions.name: italian_noise_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'È importante notare', 'vale la pena menzionare', 'Va sottolineato che', 'In conclusione', 'Per riassumere', 'Nel complesso'

evals.name: distill-numbers-urls-dates
evals.tests_change: Tests preservation of numbers, URLs, dates, Jira IDs, dollar amounts
evals.expected_output: All quantitative data preserved exactly. Noise prose around them compressed.

assertions.name: urls_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: wss://api.example.com/ws, https://docs.example.com/websocket, https://admin.example.com/sso/configure, security@example.com

assertions.name: jira_ids_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: PLAT-4521, PLAT-4498, SEC-892, BUG-7891, BUG-7903, BUG-7910, PLAT-4530, BUG-7915

assertions.name: dates_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: March 1, 2026, January 15, 2026, February 22, 2026, March 8, 2026

assertions.name: dollar_amounts_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: $12,400 (or 12400 or 12,400)

assertions.name: performance_table_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 340ms, 89ms, 1,200ms (or 1200ms), 450ms, 180ms, 42ms

evals.name: distill-nuance-preservation
evals.tests_change: Tests that qualified claims, A/B test data, and genuine limitations are preserved
evals.expected_output: Minimal compression. A/B test data, TTL rationale, and limitation all preserved. Qualifications preserved because they carry information.

assertions.name: three_strategies_preserved
assertions.check: All three cache invalidation strategies preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions all three: TTL (or time-based), event-driven (or pub/sub), version-based (or ETag)

assertions.name: limitation_preserved
assertions.check: The genuine limitation (30-second inconsistency window) preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 30-second (or 30 second or 30s) and mentions the inconsistency during import

assertions.name: bandwidth_stat_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 340GB (or 340 GB)

evals.name: distill-meaning-preservation-security
evals.tests_change: Tests that security findings are not softened or meaning-changed
evals.expected_output: Minimal compression. Severity levels, CVSS scores, code examples, and deadlines preserved exactly. No meaning softening.

assertions.name: severity_levels_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW

assertions.name: cvss_scores_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 9.8, 7.5, 5.3, 3.1

assertions.name: vulnerable_code_preserved
assertions.check: SQL injection vulnerable code example preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: f"SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%{user_input}%'" (or the f-string pattern)

assertions.name: deadlines_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 24 hours, 48 hours, 1 week, 2 weeks

assertions.name: no_meaning_softening
assertions.pass_criteria: Output still describes SQL injection as allowing 'arbitrary SQL' or 'execute' or similar strong language — NOT 'potentially vulnerable' or 'may allow'

evals.name: distill-linkedin-corporate
evals.tests_change: Tests distillation of corporate buzzword-heavy text
evals.expected_output: Corporate fluff removed. Concrete metrics and roadmap dates preserved. Hashtags removed.

assertions.name: buzzwords_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'transformative', 'delve', 'cutting-edge', 'paradigm shift', 'revolutionary', 'holistic', 'synergy', 'tapestry', 'seamlessly', 'empowers', 'innovative'

assertions.name: metrics_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 65%, 99.97%, 30%

assertions.name: roadmap_dates_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: April 15, May 1, June 30

assertions.name: hashtags_removed
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: #Engineering, #Innovation, #TeamWork, #Growth

assertions.name: word_reduction_40plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 40%
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 40%

evals.name: distill-tables-preserved
evals.tests_change: Tests that data tables are preserved with exact numbers
evals.expected_output: Tables preserved with all data. Noise prose removed. Decision and cost preserved.

assertions.name: decision_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: AWS, eu-west-1, RDS, S3, eu-central-1

assertions.name: cost_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: $14,200 (or 14200 or 14,200)

evals.name: distill-adr-structure
evals.tests_change: Tests that ADR format is respected and decision rationale preserved
evals.expected_output: ADR structure preserved. Decision reasons preserved. Noise removed. Comparison data preserved.

assertions.name: adr_structure_preserved
assertions.check: ADR sections preserved (Status, Context, Decision, Consequences)
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains headers or sections for: Status, Context, Decision, Consequences

assertions.name: decision_reasons_preserved
assertions.check: All 4 decision reasons for RabbitMQ preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: team expertise (or experience), volume within capacity (or 23 msg/s or 200 msg/s), routing/exchanges, no replay needed (or dead-letter)

assertions.name: comparison_data_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 50,000 (or 50K), 200,000 (or 200K), 3,000 (or 3K), 2M (or 2 million), $0.40

assertions.name: consequences_preserved
assertions.check: Both positive and negative consequences preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output mentions: 3-week (or 3 weeks), 8 weeks, 100x, message replay (or S3 logging)

evals.name: distill-extreme-compression
evals.tests_change: Tests maximum compression on extremely inflated text
evals.expected_output: Heavy compression (>50%). All code blocks and command table preserved. Intro/conclusion/chatbot phrases removed.

assertions.name: code_blocks_preserved
assertions.check: All 4 code blocks preserved (bash, Dockerfile, docker-compose, commands table)
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'brew install --cask docker', 'FROM python:3.12-slim', 'version: '3.8'', 'docker build -t myapp .'

assertions.name: extreme_noise_removed
assertions.check: All categories of noise removed from inflated text
assertions.pass_criteria: Output does NOT contain: 'rapidly evolving landscape', 'truly transformative paradigm', 'revolutionizing', 'empowers developers', 'containerization journey', 'comprehensive guide', 'At the end of the day'

assertions.name: word_reduction_50plus
assertions.check: Word count reduced by at least 50%
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction >= 50%

assertions.name: re_verify_triggered
assertions.check: If reduction > 60%, model re-verifies no facts were lost (per skill spec)
assertions.pass_criteria: If reduction exceeds 60%, model mentions re-verification or fact check

evals.name: distill-minimal-noise-dense
evals.tests_change: Tests that well-written technical text with near-zero noise is barely touched
evals.expected_output: Very minimal reduction (<10%). YAML config preserved. All technical details preserved.

assertions.name: minimal_reduction
assertions.pass_criteria: Report shows word reduction < 15%

assertions.name: yaml_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: 'nodeSelector:', 'disk: ssd', 'topology.kubernetes.io/zone', 'eu-west-1a', 'priorityClassName: high-priority'

assertions.name: priority_range_preserved
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains: -2 billion (or -2,000,000,000) and 1 billion (or 1,000,000,000)

evals.name: distill-directory-batch
evals.tests_change: Tests batch distillation of a directory
evals.expected_output: Model processes all .md files in the directory, produces per-file metrics and a totals row.

assertions.name: batch_processing
assertions.check: Model processes multiple files from the directory
assertions.pass_criteria: Model reads and processes more than one file from the distill-fixtures directory

assertions.name: totals_row
assertions.pass_criteria: Output contains a Total or summary row with aggregate word counts

assertions.name: manifest_skipped
assertions.check: MANIFEST.md is processed as prose (it is a .md file with content)
assertions.pass_criteria: MANIFEST.md appears in the file list (it's a valid .md file)
